text: Like most rights, the right secured by the Second Amendment is not unlimited.
original_text: In the June 26 , 2008 District of Columbia et al. v. Heller US Supreme Court majority opinion , Justice Antonin Scalia , LLB , wrote , " Like most rights , the right secured by the Second Amendment is not unlimited .

text: These weapons can shred a person's venison before the person eats it, or penetrate the walls of a person's apartment when the person is trying to defend themselves.
original_text: Jonathan Lowy , Director of Legal Action Project at the Brady Center to Prevent Gun Violence , stated , " These are weapons that will shred your venison before you eat it , or go through the walls of your apartment when you ’re trying to defend yourself … [ they are ] made for mass killing , but not useful for law-abiding citizens . "

text: These weapons are not useful for law-abiding citizens.

text: Statistics show that guns do not make people safer.
original_text: Statistics show that guns do not make people safer , thus this pro-gun argument is demonstrably untrue on its face .

text: The pro‑gun argument is demonstrably untrue on its face.
original_text: Statistics show that guns do not make people safer , thus this pro-gun argument is demonstrably untrue on its face .

text: Mentally ill shooters who kill large numbers of random people are often disturbed loners who would have a difficult time obtaining a gun if not for legal channels.
original_text: Mentally ill shooters that kill large numbers of random people are often disturbed loners who would have a difficult time obtaining a gun if not for legal channels — this is n’t to say that they would n’t eventually find a way , but it would make it more difficult .

text: Restricting legal channels would make it more difficult for shooters to obtain a gun.
original_text: Mentally ill shooters that kill large numbers of random people are often disturbed loners who would have a difficult time obtaining a gun if not for legal channels — this is n’t to say that they would n’t eventually find a way , but it would make it more difficult .

text: More guns do not make us safer.
original_text: In addition to the statistical evidence supporting the fact that more guns do n’t make us safer , we can simply look at the mechanics of a shooting .

text: Gun control laws would reduce the societal costs associated with gun violence.
original_text: Gun control laws would reduce the societal costs associated with gun violence .

text: Guns are rarely used in self-defense.
original_text: Guns are rarely used in self-defense .

text: Or better still why wasn’t the FIRST Amendment, “Congress shall make no law restricting the right of the people to keep and bear arms, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof.”
original_text: Or better still why was n’t the FIRST Amendment , “ Congress shall make no law restricting the right of the people to keep and bear arms , or prohibiting the free exercise thereof . ”

text: The Founders understood that the right to own and bear laws is as fundamental and as essential to maintaining liberty as the rights of free speech, a free press, freedom of religion, and the other protections against government encroachments on liberty delineated in the Bill of Rights.
original_text: Lawrence Hunter , Chairman of Revolution PAC , stated , " The Founders understood that the right to own and bear laws is as fundamental and as essential to maintaining liberty as are the rights of free speech , a free press , freedom of religion and the other protections against government encroachments on liberty delineated in the Bill of Rights . "

text: Gun control efforts have proved ineffective.
original_text: Gun control efforts have proved ineffective .

text: The police can not protect everyone all of the time .
original_text: The police can not protect everyone all of the time .

text: The mentally ill are responsible for violence, not the weapons.
original_text: In order to do this , these people have asserted that it is the mentally ill who are responsible for violence , not the weapons , and that simply registering the mentally ill will stop gun violence .

text: Simply registering the mentally ill will stop gun violence.
